query: SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.amount, m.matchedItemName FROM invoiceLineItems li JOIN invoiceLineItemMatches m ON m.invoiceLineItemId = li.id WHERE m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 ORDER BY m.matchedItemName LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.amount, m.matchedItemName FROM invoiceLineItems li JOIN invoiceLineItemMatches m ON m.invoiceLineItemId = li.id WHERE m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 ORDER BY m.matchedItemName LIMIT 20;
